title: Noronhia camptoneura

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its reported antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Bioactive constituents isolated from Noronhia camptoneura include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its therapeutic effects.
